app.name: Dream Creator
app.description: An AI agent for content creators

empty.title: No Assistants
empty.description: Create an assistant to configure models, tools, and policies.

gateway.controlPlaneHelp: Enable control plane features (cannot be disabled once enabled).
gateway.permissionHelp: Set the tool execution permission level.
gateway.sandboxHelp: Require a sandbox for tools that need it.

toolLoop.enabledHelp: Detect repeated tool calls and no-progress loops.
toolLoop.warnHelp: Warn when the loop count reaches this threshold.
toolLoop.criticalHelp: Trigger critical handling when the loop count reaches this threshold.
toolLoop.globalHelp: Global circuit breaker threshold across runs.
toolLoop.historyHelp: Number of recent tool calls inspected for loops.
toolLoop.detectorPollHelp: Detect polling that makes no progress.

runtime.contextWarnHelp: Warn when estimated context tokens reach this value.
runtime.contextHardHelp: Block runs when the model context window drops below this value.
runtime.compactionModeHelp: Control whether and how context compaction runs.
runtime.compactionReserveTokensHelp: Keep this token budget free to avoid hitting the hard limit.
runtime.compactionKeepRecentHelp: Preserve this budget for the most recent messages.
runtime.compactionReserveFloorHelp: Minimum reserve tokens enforced even if reserve is lower.
runtime.compactionMaxHistoryShareHelp: Upper bound for history share of the context window.
runtime.compactionMemoryFlushEnabledHelp: Run a memory flush turn before compaction when near limits.
runtime.compactionMemoryFlushSoftHelp: Trigger memory flush when tokens exceed context minus reserve minus this value.
runtime.compactionMemoryFlushPromptHelp: User-facing prompt used during memory flush.
runtime.compactionMemoryFlushSystemHelp: System prompt used during memory flush.

heartbeat.enabledHelp: Master switch for periodic and event-driven heartbeat processing.
heartbeat.periodicEnabledHelp: Run background review on schedule and deliver results to notifications.
heartbeat.everyHelp: Only applies when periodic review is enabled.
heartbeat.runSessionHelp: Choose the conversation used for heartbeat checks. Manual trigger is skipped when not selected.
heartbeat.notificationCenterHelp: Heartbeat output is shown in notifications instead of conversations.
heartbeat.promptAppendHelp: Optional extra instructions appended after the strict HEARTBEAT_OK / JSON contract.

triggerReason.busy: System is busy, try again soon
triggerReason.notDue: Heartbeat interval is not due yet

http.maxBodyBytesHelp: Maximum request body size (bytes) for responses.
http.maxUrlPartsHelp: Maximum number of URL path segments allowed.

files.allowedMimesHelp: Allowed MIME types for file fetches.
files.pdfMaxPagesHelp: Maximum pages to parse from a PDF.
files.pdfMaxPixelsHelp: Maximum total pixels when rasterizing PDF pages.
files.pdfMinTextCharsHelp: Minimum extracted text chars before treating PDF as text.

images.allowedMimesHelp: Allowed MIME types for image fetches.

talk.voiceAliasesDescription: Alias list: name=voiceId (comma or newline separated).
talk.interruptOnSpeechDescription: Stop speaking when you start talking.

tts.providerDescription: Select provider used by the TTS tool.

workspace.empty: Workspace will be created after the first chat.

model.inheritAgentHint: Using agent model for this capability.

entries.assistantRequired: Select an assistant to browse memories.

sidebar.empty: No principals found with current filters.

summary.selectHint: Select a user or group from the left list.
summary.refreshNoChange: Profile is already up to date
summary.empty: No memories found for the selected principal.

entries.empty: No memories found with current filters.

overview.title: Usage Overview
overview.description: Track request volume, token usage, and cost.

startup.minimizeToTray: Minimize to tray on auto start

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.testHint: Test first, then save after success.

clearConfirm.title: Clear proxy settings?
clearConfirm.description: This will disable the proxy and remove the manual configuration.

calls.skillsRemoteMinLength: Type at least 2 characters and press enter.
calls.skillsUnavailableHint: Install or repair ClawHub in external tools first.
calls.skillsRateLimitedHint: Rate limit exceeded. Please retry later.
calls.skillsForceInstallDescription: This skill is flagged as suspicious. Review the skill code before continuing.
calls.skillsDetailPartial: Failed to load full detail. Showing basic search result.
calls.skillsSelectDescription: Choose a skill from the left list to view details.

sources.loadFailed: Failed to load skills sources settings.
sources.blocked: Source management is blocked by skills security policy (source_write=deny).
sources.emptyDescription: Add local skills directories to include them in global skills aggregation.

audit.loadFailed: Failed to load skills audit logs.
audit.emptyDescription: Run a skills action to generate audit entries.
audit.emptyFiltered: No records matched the current filters.

config.clearDialogDescription: This action will remove all current audit logs and cannot be undone.

calls.skillsRemoteDisabledHint: Enable remote search in skills > sources first.
calls.skillsRemoteInstallDisabledHint: Enable install in skills > sources first.

read.name: Read
read.description: Read file content from the workspace.

write.name: Write
write.description: Write content to a workspace file.

edit.name: Edit
edit.description: Replace exact text in a workspace file.

apply_patch.name: Apply patch
apply_patch.description: Apply a unified diff patch to workspace files.

exec.name: Exec
exec.description: Execute a command on the host.

web_search.name: Web search
web_search.description: Search the web via the configured provider.

browser.name: Browser control
browser.description: Control browser page loading with Playwright.

image.name: Image processing
image.description: Analyze one or more images with the configured image model.

cron.name: Scheduler
cron.description: Manage Gateway cron jobs and wake events.

sessions_send.name: Session send
sessions_send.description: Send a message to a session.

external_tools_query.name: External tools query
external_tools_query.description: Query external tools status, install progress, and updates.

skills_query.name: Skills query
skills_query.description: Query skills status, catalog, and search results.

skills_policy.name: Skills policy
skills_policy.description: Get or set assistant skill policy.

library_adapter.name: Library adapter
library_adapter.description: Adapt tool calls into library tasks.

grep.name: Grep
grep.description: Search workspace files for a pattern.

find.name: Find
find.description: Find files by glob pattern in the workspace.

ls.name: Ls
ls.description: List directory contents in the workspace.

bash.name: Bash
bash.description: Run shell commands in the workspace sandbox.

memory_recall.name: Memory recall
memory_recall.description: Recall long-term memories with hybrid retrieval.

memory_forget.name: Memory forget
memory_forget.description: Delete specific or matched memory entries.

memory_update.name: Memory update
memory_update.description: Update existing memory entry content or category.

memory_list.name: Memory list
memory_list.description: List recent memory entries by filter.

subagent_run.name: Subagent run
subagent_run.description: Run a sub-agent task in an isolated workspace.

subtitle.name: Subtitle ops
subtitle.description: Parse, convert, validate, fix, and translate subtitles.

library.name: Library query
library.description: Read-only library inspector for library list, full library detail, operations, history, and single operation status.

library_manage.name: Library jobs
library_manage.description: Create and manage async library jobs for download, transcode, and subtitle processing. Job creation returns an operationId immediately for later progress checks.

webSearch.typeDesc: Switch between API search and external tools search.
webSearch.apiKeyHint: Leave blank to use environment variables.
webSearch.externalToolsHint: External tools mode is reserved. No options are available yet.

webFetch.typeDesc: Switch between Playwright headless browser mode and builtin HTTP fetch mode.
webFetch.playwrightMarkdownDesc: Convert rendered HTML output into Markdown.
webFetch.playwrightHint: Playwright mode runs in headless browser and only reads cookies from connectors. It will not persist new cookies.
webFetch.acceptMarkdownDesc: When enabled, requests prefer text/Markdown with HTML fallback.
webFetch.enableUserAgentDesc: When disabled, no explicit User-Agent will be sent.
webFetch.retryMaxDesc: Applies only to safely retryable methods (E.G. GET/HEAD/OPTIONS).
webFetch.headersDesc: Provide a JSON object, E.G. {"X-Test":"1"}. It merges with tool-call headers.

browserControl.ssrfSectionDesc: Private network and hostname allowlist options.
browserControl.executablePathPending: Path will appear after Playwright runtime check.
browserControl.ssrfDangerouslyAllowPrivateNetworkDesc: Allow browser navigation to private/internal networks.
browserControl.arrayInvalidDesc: Use a JSON string array, for example ["localhost","metadata.Internal"].

config.title: Configuration
config.noneDescription: No configuration is required for this tool.

connectors.loginHint: A browser window will open. Sign in, then close the window to save cookies.
connectors.loginDescription: Finish login in the browser window, then close it.
connectors.installDescription: Playwright is required to open the browser.
connectors.playwrightMissing: Playwright is not installed. Install it to continue.

actions.disabledHint: Configure required credentials to enable actions.

hints.allowFrom: Use numeric Telegram user IDs, one per line.
hints.groups: Use Telegram group chat IDs; use * to match all groups.
hints.groupAllowFrom: User IDs in this list bypass group policy checks.

pairing.title: Pairing
pairing.description: Pairing requests and approvals will appear here.

reset.title: Reset channel configuration?
reset.description: This will remove all saved configuration for the channel.

validation.commandPrefix: Unable to save: command must start with /.
validation.commandInvalid: Unable to save: Telegram custom command is invalid (use a-Z, 0-9, underscore; max 32 chars).
validation.descriptionRequired: Unable to save: description is required.

installDialog.description: Review the current version, target version, and install progress for the selected external tool.

externalTools.releaseNotesDescription: Latest release notes from the tool author.

manage.title: Manage Models
manage.description: Add or edit models manually. This is useful when the provider endpoint cannot list models.

custom.title: Add Custom Provider
custom.description: Provide a name, type, and endpoint for the custom provider.
custom.updateInvalid: Name and endpoint are required for a custom provider.

delete.title: Delete Provider
delete.description: Delete this provider? This action cannot be undone.
delete.descriptionWithName: Delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.debugHint: Off hides debug entry, basic shows debug panels, full also records prompt content in prompt.Report.
advanced.unlockedHint: Debug controls stay visible until you leave the about page.

dialog.bulkDeleteDescription: Delete {count} selected jobs. This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Name
form.deliveryToInvalid: Webhook URL must start with http:// or https://
form.deliveryFailureChannelInvalid: Failure destination channel must be one of: default, app, Telegram
form.deliveryFailureToRequired: Failure destination webhook URL is required
form.deliveryFailureToInvalid: Failure destination webhook URL must start with http:// or https://
form.mainTargetRequiresSystemEvent: Main session target requires system event payload
form.isolatedTargetRequiresAgentTurn: Isolated session target requires agent turn payload

resources.filteredEmptyDescription: Try another keyword or clear the current search.
resources.deleteLibrarySuccess: Library, tasks, files, and records deleted.
resources.deleteLibraryConfirmDescription: This permanently deletes the library, its tasks, files, records, and workspace state, and removes local files from disk. This action cannot be undone.

download.title: New Download
download.dependencyDescription: Required external tools are missing. Please install or repair them in external tools.
download.connectorHint: Use connector cookies for parsing and download
download.connectorUnsupportedHint: No connector is available for this site yet.
download.subtitle: Subtitle

task.title: Operation
task.deleteDescription: This removes the task record for {name}. The library stays available.
task.deleteDialogDescription: This removes the task record for {name}. Files in the library stay untouched.
task.deleteImpactDescription: This task currently outputs {count} file(s). Turn on file deletion only if you also want to remove those outputs from the library.
task.deleteKeepFilesDescription: This task has no removable output files. Deleting it only removes the task record.
task.deleteFilesLabel: Also delete this task's output files
task.deleteSuccessWithFiles: The task was removed and its output files were marked as deleted.
task.bulkDeleteDescription: This removes {count} selected task record(s). Files in the library stay untouched.
task.cancelSuccessDescription: The subtitle task has been stopped and checkpoint progress was kept.
task.resumeSuccessDescription: The subtitle task will continue from saved checkpoint progress when available.
task.dialogDescription: Inspect operation status, outputs, linked library files, and detailed metadata.
task.failedCheckDescription: Review dependency and environment checks before retrying the failed operation.

file.deleteDescription: This removes {name} from the library. Linked task records stay available and will show the file as deleted.
file.deleteImpactDescription: Linked task: {task}. Deleting this file does not delete the task or the library.
file.deleteKeepTaskDescription: Deleting this file only affects the file itself. The library stays available.
file.deleteSuccess: The file was removed from the library.
file.deleteSuccessWithLocal: The file was removed from the library and deleted locally.
file.bulkDeleteDescription: This removes {count} selected file record(s) from the library. Local files stay untouched.

rowMenu.deleteDescription: This will remove {name} from the library. This action cannot be undone.

import.videoUnsupportedHint: Please choose a supported video format.
import.subtitleUnsupportedHint: Please choose a supported subtitle format (srt/vtt/ass/ssa/itt/ttml/fcpxml).
import.videoDialogDescription: Review the selected video file and set the import name.
import.subtitleDialogDescription: Review the selected subtitle file and set the import name.

dialog.targetDescription: Choose whether the import should create a new library or write into the current workspace library.
dialog.targetHint: Only the current workspace library can be reused here. Otherwise the import creates a new library entry.
dialog.fileDescription: Review the selected file details before confirming the import.
dialog.namingDescription: Keep the suggested name, or override it before importing.
dialog.namingHint: When left empty, the import uses the selected file name without its extension.

empty.description: Create a download or import media to start building the library.

records.title: Records
records.emptyDescription: Operation history and imports will appear here.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.fastReadLatestStateDescription: When opening the workspace, restore the most recently saved workspace state for this library first.

translateLanguages.description: Manage the global subtitle language enum used by detection and translation targets.
translateLanguages.searchEmpty: No languages match the current search.

pages.overviewDescription: Workspace defaults and subtitle style readiness in one place.
pages.overviewWorkspaceDescription: Module-level workspace behavior that applies across all library items.
pages.languagesDescription: Builtin and custom languages used by subtitle tasks.
pages.glossaryDescription: Reusable terminology constraints for subtitle tasks.
pages.promptsDescription: Reusable prompt presets for translation and proofread flows.
pages.subtitleStylesDescription: Mono and bilingual style presets used by preview and subtitle export.
pages.fontManagementDescription: Track required fonts and repair missing families.
pages.subtitleExportPresetsDescription: Manage subtitle export presets for the current library.
pages.videoExportPresetsDescription: Manage video and audio export presets plus subtitle routing.
pages.remoteSourcesDescription: Remote style manifests and font source sync status.

languageAssets.glossaryEmptyDescription: Create a glossary profile to turn terminology mappings and wording rules into reusable assets.
languageAssets.glossarySearchEmpty: No glossaries match the current search.
languageAssets.promptEmptyDescription: Create a prompt profile to capture reusable tone, style, and instruction presets.
languageAssets.promptSearchEmpty: No prompts match the current search.
languageAssets.promptBody: Example: translate brand names consistently, keep subtitle wording compact, and avoid over-literal phrasing.

subtitleStyles.applyTemplateConfirm: Applying this style will overwrite the current style and cannot be undone. Continue?
subtitleStyles.emptyStateDescription: Create or import subtitle styles from the top-right. They will appear here grouped by mono and bilingual.
subtitleStyles.emptyDetailDescription: Create or import a subtitle style from the top-right. After saving, edit its parameters and preview it here.
subtitleStyles.unsavedDescription: Save or undo current changes before switching styles.
subtitleStyles.importGuideText: Select ASS/SSA/DCSSP files, then confirm and create styles on this page.
subtitleStyles.bilingualRequiresMonoDescription: Save at least one mono style before creating a bilingual style.
subtitleStyles.overviewDescription: Keep the overview focused on readiness, defaults, and remote coverage for mono/bilingual style presets.
subtitleStyles.defaultsDescription: These are the mono/bilingual styles currently used as workspace defaults.
subtitleStyles.deliveryReadinessDescription: A compact check of whether fonts and remote sources are ready enough for preview and export.
subtitleStyles.fontManagementDescription: Missing fonts are searched from enabled remote font sources. Installation follows FontGet-style user font setup so the operating system can use the font directly.
subtitleStyles.referencedFontsDescription: Every font referenced by subtitle styles is listed here. Missing fonts can be repaired directly from enabled font sources.
subtitleStyles.setDefaultExportProfile: Set as default subtitle export preset
subtitleStyles.styleSourcesDescription: Configure remote subtitle style sources, browse the remote list, and import selected items into subtitle styles.
subtitleStyles.fontSourcesDescription: Built-in FontGet sources are always enabled. Review their sync status here and refresh metadata when needed.
subtitleStyles.fontSourcesAlreadyAvailable: Built-in font sources are already available in this list.
subtitleStyles.syncFontSourceSuccessDescription: Remote font source metadata has been refreshed.
subtitleStyles.syncFontSourceFailedFallback: Unable to sync this font source.
subtitleStyles.installUserFontSuccessDescription: The font was installed to your user font directory. The font list will refresh automatically.
subtitleStyles.installMachineFontSuccessDescription: The font was installed to the system font directory. The font list will refresh automatically.
subtitleStyles.noFontSourceEnabled: Enable at least one remote font source before repairing missing fonts.
subtitleStyles.remoteMatchUnavailable: Matched in remote sources but unavailable to install.
subtitleStyles.remoteFontUnavailableNoDownload: The matched source lists this font, but does not provide a downloadable file.
subtitleStyles.remoteFontUnavailableUnsupported: The matched source exposes this font, but its download format is not supported yet.
subtitleStyles.remoteFontUnavailableGeneric: The matched source exposes this font, but it cannot be installed right now.
subtitleStyles.emptyRemoteStyleItems: No remote style items found in this manifest.
subtitleStyles.importSourceItemCreated: The remote subtitle style was added to subtitle styles.
subtitleStyles.importSourceItemUpdated: The remote subtitle style was refreshed in this library.

taskRuntime.searchEmpty: No runtime settings match the current search.
taskRuntime.structuredOutputDescription: Auto tries JSON Schema first and falls back to prompt-only JSON if the provider rejects response_format.
taskRuntime.thinkingModeDescription: Structured subtitle tasks are usually most stable with thinking disabled.
taskRuntime.maxTokensFloorDescription: Minimum output-token budget reserved for a chunk.
taskRuntime.maxTokensCeilingDescription: Upper output-token cap used after estimating chunk size.
taskRuntime.retryTokenStepDescription: Extra output tokens added when retrying an invalid chunk response.

videoExportPresets.savedDescription: The custom video export preset has been updated.
videoExportPresets.deletedDescription: The custom export preset has been removed.
videoExportPresets.name: Preset name
videoExportPresets.crfDescription: Lower CRF produces higher visual quality.
videoExportPresets.allowUpscaleDescription: Permit larger target resolutions even when the source is smaller.
videoExportPresets.searchEmpty: No presets match the current search.
videoExportPresets.emptyDetailDescription: Select an existing preset or create a new video or audio export preset.

select.description: Choose a library to view tasks, files and history.

transcode.missingPreset: No matching video export preset is available.

workspace.emptyDescription: The workspace only shows video and subtitle assets from the current library. Without an open library, this view stays empty.

header.noReferenceTrackHint: Translate only from the active source lane.

table.emptyFiltered: No subtitle cues match the current filters.

exportVideo.outputHint: Video export presets are managed in library config and stay aligned with the rest of the library flow.
exportVideo.subtitleHandlingDescription: Decide whether the export should keep subtitles out of the video, embed a selectable subtitle track, or burn subtitles into the picture.
exportVideo.embedStyleUnsupported: The current container only supports embedded text subtitles ({route}), so the export falls back automatically. ASS style selection is only used for burn-in or ASS embedding routes.

handling.noneDescription: Only export the video output. Subtitle embedding and burn-in stay disabled.
handling.embedDescription: Mux a soft subtitle track into the exported video so the viewer can toggle it on demand.
handling.burninDescription: Render the current subtitle view directly into the exported video with the selected subtitle style.

exportSubtitle.trackRequired: Select a subtitle track before exporting the current draft.
exportSubtitle.title: Title
exportSubtitle.saveDescription: After confirmation, the system save dialog lets you choose the target file path.

languageTask.title: Workspace Tasks
languageTask.description: Configure translation, proofreading, or structural QA for the current workspace draft.
languageTask.qaGuidelineDescription: Controls the active realtime QA profile for timing, CPS, CPL, text, and layout checks.
languageTask.restoreWarningDescription: Restore replaces the current workspace draft with the original subtitle source for this lane.
languageTask.targetLanguageDescription: Choose the language for the derived subtitle lane.
languageTask.translateSourceLaneDescription: Choose the workspace subtitle lane used as the translation source.
languageTask.glossaryProfilesDescription: Reusable term locks and fixed phrasing.
languageTask.noGlossaryProfiles: No glossary profiles available in library config.
languageTask.referenceTrackDescription: Optional extra subtitle track for terminology or style reference.
languageTask.noPromptProfiles: No prompt profiles available in library config.
languageTask.inlinePromptDescription: One-off task guidance for this run.
languageTask.translateInlinePromptPlaceholder: Example: keep the tone concise and modern, translate product names with the glossary, and avoid overly literal phrasing.
languageTask.proofreadSourceLaneDescription: Choose the workspace subtitle lane used as the proofreading source.
languageTask.noProofreadPromptProfiles: No proofread prompt profiles available in library config.
languageTask.proofreadInlinePromptPlaceholder: Example: keep the speaker's tone natural, preserve intentional pauses, and prefer concise punctuation.
languageTask.qaGuidelineDescriptionLong: Switch the active subtitle validation guideline for timing, CPS, CPL, text, and layout checks.
languageTask.qaRealtimeDescription: Enabled checks immediately affect row warnings, suggestion content, and metric columns.

qaChecks.textDescription: Flag empty subtitle text in the current draft.
qaChecks.timingDescription: Flag very short cues and extremely tight gaps.
qaChecks.layoutDescription: Flag cues that exceed the guideline line-count limit.
qaChecks.cpsDescription: Show the CPS column and flag cues above the active guideline.
qaChecks.cplDescription: Show the CPL column and flag cues above the active guideline.

languageTask.resetCurrentDraftDescription: Discard current workspace edits and reload the original subtitle source for the selected lane.
languageTask.restoreOriginalWarning: This action removes current draft edits for the selected subtitle lane and reloads the original source.

importSubtitle.title: Import Subtitle
importSubtitle.description: Configure deterministic text cleanup before the workspace import flow takes over.
importSubtitle.normalizationDescription: Only safe cleanup passes live here. Structural QA and language proofreading stay separate.
importSubtitle.normalizeLineBreaksDescription: Convert mixed newline styles into a single workspace-safe format.
importSubtitle.trimWhitespaceDescription: Remove leading and trailing spaces on every subtitle line.
importSubtitle.removeBlankLinesDescription: Collapse empty lines that make cues look visually broken.
importSubtitle.repairEncodingDescription: Apply basic compatibility fixes before parsing the subtitle source.
importSubtitle.guidelineInheritanceDescription: Imported subtitles inherit the current profile by default, but you can override it for this import.

preview.placeholderDescription: Vidstack and LibASS preview are ready. Connect a media asset to inspect subtitle rendering, playback sync, and burn-in parity.

subtitle.validateHint: Validate current subtitle draft for timing and text issues.

waveform.title: Waveform Timeline
waveform.disabledLargeMedia: Waveform is disabled for large media files such as {size}. Playback preview remains available.
waveform.disabledLongMedia: Waveform is disabled for long media such as {duration}. Playback preview remains available.

readiness.checkingDescription: Inspecting the default assistant, provider model, and API key before launching translation.
readiness.noAssistantDescription: Create or enable a default assistant in Gateway settings before launching subtitle translation.
readiness.assistantDisabledDescription: Enable the default assistant in Gateway settings before launching subtitle translation.
readiness.assistantModelMissingDescription: Choose a primary agent model for the default assistant before launching subtitle translation.
readiness.noProviderModelDescription: Enable a provider and sync at least one chat model before launching subtitle translation.
readiness.modelReferenceInvalidDescription: The default assistant model must include both provider and model name.
readiness.providerUnavailableDescription: The provider configured for the default assistant is disabled or missing from the enabled provider list.
readiness.modelUnavailableDescription: Sync provider models or choose another model for the default assistant before translating subtitles.
readiness.apiKeyMissingDescription: Add the provider API key in provider settings before launching subtitle translation.

review.pendingDescription: {count} suggestions still need a decision. Review them one by one or use the batch actions here, then finish the review.
review.lockedTooltip: Finish the current review and click “complete review” before using this action.
review.completeBlockedDescription: Resolve every suggestion first, or use the batch actions to finish all decisions before completing the review.
review.defaultQaReason: Text revision suggestion generated from the current QA rules.
review.defaultProofreadReason: Language revision suggestion generated from the current proofreading settings.
review.applySuccessDescription: {count} subtitle changes were merged into the current track.
review.discardSuccessDescription: The pending review suggestions were discarded and the current track is unlocked.
review.proofreadRunningDescription: The current track already has a running proofreading task. Wait for it to finish before starting another one.

notifications.translationReadyDescription: {name} has been attached as the paired subtitle track.
notifications.proofreadReadyDescription: {count} proofreading suggestions are waiting for review.
notifications.qaReviewReadyDescription: {count} QA suggestions are waiting for review.
notifications.restoreTrackRequiredDescription: Select a subtitle track before restoring the original content.
notifications.originalRestoredDescription: The workspace draft has been reloaded from the original subtitle source.
notifications.noFileSelectedDescription: Open a media or subtitle resource before jumping to its location.
notifications.exportVideoTrackRequiredDescription: Select a video resource before queuing an export.
notifications.exportVideoPresetRequiredDescription: Choose a video export preset before queuing the export.
notifications.emptySubtitleOutputDescription: The current subtitle view has no ASS content to render. Switch lane mode or choose a subtitle track first.
notifications.exportQueuedDescription: Video export {name} is now running in the background.
notifications.translatePromptRequiredDescription: Enter a translate prompt before saving it as a reusable profile.
notifications.moduleConfigUnavailableDescription: Reload the library module config before saving prompt profiles from the workspace.
notifications.translatePromptProfileSavedDescription: {name} is now available in translate prompt profiles.
notifications.proofreadPromptRequiredDescription: Enter a proofread prompt before saving it as a reusable profile.
notifications.proofreadPromptProfileSavedDescription: {name} is now available in proofread prompt profiles.
notifications.translateTrackRequiredDescription: Select a subtitle track before launching translation.
notifications.translationQueuedWithConstraintsDescript: Background translation started for {language} with {count} constraint slots.
notifications.proofreadTrackRequiredDescription: Select a subtitle track before launching proofreading.
notifications.proofreadQueuedDefaultDescription: Background proofread started with a conservative language-quality pass.
notifications.importProfileReadyDescription: {guideline} guideline with {count} normalization passes will be applied before import.

qaIssues.tightGap: Very small gap to previous cue

prompt.emptyForRun: No prompt.Report event for this run

messages.unavailable: No message snapshot. Switch debug to enhanced and run again.

frontend.dialogDesc: Use this to verify modal styles.

realtime.notifyBody: This is a test OS notification.

default.label: Default
default.description: Quiet neutrals like soft daylight on a white wall

contrast.label: Contrast
contrast.description: Pull the layers apart so every surface keeps its edge

slate.label: Slate
slate.description: Cool blue gray with a little sea air calm and precise

warm.label: Warm
warm.description: Like late light on paper warm without turning muddy

entry.checkingDescription: Gateway, model configuration, Bun, and ClawHub status refresh automatically.
entry.blockedDescription: Please finish initializing the items above.

assistantPill.title: No assistant selected yet
assistantPill.description: Choose or create one, then you can start typing right away.

productMode.title: Choose how Dream Creator shows up on this machine
productMode.description: Switch between a focused download workspace and the full creative cockpit with chat, agents, memory, and gateway controls.
productMode.firstRunHint: Pick a mode once. You can change it later from the main sidebar footer.
productMode.changeHint: You can switch modes at any time. The change applies immediately to the main window and settings navigation.

full.title: Full Mode
full.subtitle: The complete AI workstation.
full.description: Keep chat, assistant workspace, memory, gateway controls, and the broader AI surface available everywhere.

download.title: Download Mode
download.subtitle: A clean, fast download-focused workspace.
download.description: Hide the AI-heavy surface and keep the app centered on the library, downloads, and media operations.

general.title: General
general.description: Choose the interface language and validate proxy access when needed.

ai.title: AI
ai.description: Connect a provider, sync available models, and activate the Gateway default assistant model.

dependencies.title: Dependencies
dependencies.description: Select a product mode and install the tools required by that mode.

ai.noProvider: No provider has been configured yet.
ai.modelsEmpty: No usable models are available for this provider yet. Refresh to load a compact model list here.
ai.refreshHint: Enter the access key and refresh to load the available model list below.

language.description: Choose the UI language before finishing setup.

gateway.title: Gateway is not enabled
gateway.description: Enable Gateway so assistant features can run.

providers.description: Connect a provider and sync at least one usable model.

model.title: Gateway model is missing
model.description: Assign a default assistant model so Gateway can respond.

productMode.title: Choose a Product Mode
productMode.description: Pick full mode or download mode to resolve the required dependency set.

issues.aiSkippedDescription: AI is deferred. Chat and subtitle translation remain unavailable until this step is completed.
